name: headline
label: Headline
default: The intelligence layer your portfolio is missing.

name: sub
label: Sub-headline
default: Two tools that help operations, finance, and risk leaders quantify invisible building risk and build the case for predictive operations.

default.title: The TCRO Framework: A Holistic Guide to Total Cost of Risk Ownership
default.text: Most organizations measure Cost of Risk too narrowly. This whitepaper defines every component of Total Cost of Risk Ownership and gives finance and operations leaders a shared language for defending capital and insurance decisions.

default.title: TCRO Calculator: What Is Invisible Building Risk Costing You?
default.text: Input your portfolio's key operating data and the calculator estimates your full Total Cost of Risk Ownership and the potential financial impact of moving from reactive to predictive operations.
